title: CP mod
description:
CP mod is a mod that will be upgrading through the time. It's goal is to add some blocks/features used in the Portuguese Rails and help everyone who wants to build rail inspired in this country.
Any suggestion is well received.
body:
# CP MOD
## About the mod
- This mod goal is to put in minecraft some blocks/things used in the Portuguese railways, to help everybody that wants to create a realistic rail system inspired in this country.
- This mod can have a small amount of features, because we will be developing it through the time and it will be updated. 
- Any suggestion (New version of minecraft, features, block) are well received.
